ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., North America) */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country is located on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender type (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields_of_study" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field of study */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field of study */,
  "field_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the field */,
  "field_category" TEXT /* Broad category the field belongs to (e.g., STEM, Humanities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "isc_ed_level" TEXT /* ISCED classification level */,
  "level_category" TEXT /* Broad category the level belongs to (e.g., Tertiary, Secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field of study */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistic */,
  "percent" REAL /* Percentage of individuals in the specified category */,
  "flags" TEXT /* Flags for special cases (e.g., data quality issues) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the entry was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_flags FOREIGN KEY ("flags") REFERENCES flags ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields_of_study ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The actual year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "flag_category" TEXT /* Broad category the flag belongs to (e.g., Data Quality, Discrepancy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., National Education Board) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_details" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for inquiries */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the contact person */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the contact person belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Researcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the permission is for */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read access to the table */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has write access to the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
